items.title: Italian toddler dies after transplant with heart 'burned by frostbite'
items.dek: The heart given to two-year-old Domenico was reportedly severely damaged during its transfer to hospital.
items.body: The heart given to two-year-old Domenico was reportedly severely damaged during its transfer to hospital.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Couple left with $200k bill after baby born in US
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Avalanches kill five in Austrian Alps, officials say
items.dek: A man skiing with his son was among the victims on Friday, bringing the region's avalanche death toll this season to at least 21.
items.body: A man skiing with his son was among the victims on Friday, bringing the region's avalanche death toll this season to at least 21.
items.author: IriLine Desk
